plays.comments: Abandoned sewers. Almost died but hit goal on last turn.
Drake Nest in order to get underwater breathing

Joc, Jon, and I were ninjas fighting an onslaught of incoming ghosts. We held them off long enough to face Chuck No-Rice and with our powers combined and the help of a healthy portion of incense we managed to defeat him and save the countryside.
Forgot to do # of players when monster surges happened so generally fewer monsters in play (or fewer terror track raises)
